---
title: "Teaching"
---


## Courses

**Experiments and Causal Inference**
Spring 2023–25 | Fall 2023\
<a href="files/syllabuses/Experiments%20and%20Causal%20Inference%20-%20%20Spring%202025.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-xs"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Syllabus</a>

<hr>

**Democratic Erosion**
Fall 2025 | Spring–Fall 2026\
<a href="files/syllabuses/Democratic%20Erosion%20-%20Spring%202026.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-xs"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Syllabus</a>

<hr>

**Research Methods** (Senior Seminar)
Fall 2023–25 | Spring 2023–26\
<a href="files/syllabuses/Research%20Methods%20-%20Spring%202026.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-xs"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Syllabus</a>

<hr>

**Introduction to Social Science**
Fall 2023–24\
<a href="files/syllabuses/Intro%20to%20Social%20Science%20-%20Fall%202024.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-xs"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Syllabus</a>

<hr>

**Political Communication** (Short Course)
Spring 2023–24\
<a href="files/syllabuses/PolCom%20-%20Syllabus%20Spring%202024.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-xs"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Syllabus</a>

<hr>

**Designing and Analyzing Experiments** (Faculty course)
January 2024\
<a href="files/syllabuses/Survey%20Experiments%20-%20Faculty%20Short%20Course%20-%20Jan%202024.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-xs"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Syllabus</a>

<hr>

**Applied Political Science Research**
Fall 2021\
<a href="files/syllabuses/Political%20Science%20Research%20and%20Methods%20-%20Fall%202021.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-xs"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Syllabus</a>

<hr>

**Issues in Latin American Politics**
Summer 2020\
<a href="files/syllabuses/Issues%20in%20Latin%20American%20Politics%20-%20Summer%202020.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-xs"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Syllabus</a>
